main.description: Every belief record whose explicit `holder` matches the given DID. Records with an implicit holder (repo owner) are not returned here — callers needing the repo-owner fallback filter over `Entry<Belief>` directly.

output.description: Paged<EnvelopedEntry<R>> — identical shape to the REST endpoint for this query.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a prior page of results.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return in one page.

description: XRPC facade for the `beliefs_by_holder` catalog query. Mirrors the REST endpoint at `/v1/beliefs/by-holder`; both paths invoke the same handler.
